item.title: You love to see it. United we stand.
item.description: I can't understand how police think they can come stop people from talking when this is EXACTLY what the first amendment is about. "Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof; or abridging the freedom of speech, or of the press; or the right of the people peaceably to assemble, and to petition the Government for a redress of grievances." !!!to petition the Government for a redress of grievances!!! "Tonight, July 21, another packed Grayslake board meeting had residents and allies from across Lake County demanding action be taken to stop the T5 hyperscale data center. The village board limited comments and had police escort away commenters who went over the two minute limit. After Mayor Elizabeth Davies ended the meeting before all Grayslake residents present could speak, one resident took to the microphone to give her comments anyway. Community members formed a wall around her so she could give it without interruption by police. Big tech and the billionaires pushing data centers into our communities may have the money, but our communities have the people power. We can organize together to win a society for the workers, not the billionaires."
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Frog bacteria kill 100% of cancer cells in trial
item.description: A research team at the Japan Advanced Institute of Science and Technology has discovered that the bacterium Ewingella americana, isolated from the intestines of Japanese tree frogs (Dryophytes japonicus), has remarkably potent antitumor properties. When injected into the bloodstream of mice with induced colorectal cancer, a single treatment completely eliminated tumors by both attacking cancer cells and activating the immune system. The bacterial treatment outperformed standard therapies, including immuno- and chemotherapy, and it did so with basically no side effects. The mice received a single intravenous administration via tail vein injection. The bacteria being present in their blood stream was enough for a 100% success rate of cancer eradication. Furthermore, the mice were practically immune to this type of cancer afterwards. It's early days still, the research needs to be duplicated and eventually moved on to clinical trials, but the findings point to a promising new type of cancer therapy that might in the future work against many solid tumors. Article with more info: https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/07/260709160655.htm Full research paper: https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/19490976.2025.2599562#abstract

item.title: Wow
item.description: https://apnews.com/article/california-research-grants-terminated-keywords-lawsuit-a0ddb01413ecb68d9668490a20be6207 As someone who was an essential worker and was left disabled by Covid and had to watch most of the research efforts here in California and the US go up in smoke, this boils my blood. Not only did trump and his administrations propaganda, dereliction of duty, lies, dismissal, and apathy surrounding Covid ultimately cause my disability, and not only did him and his administration come right back in and destroy most of the research efforts, but they just plugged a keyword into an ai bot and canceled it all based on that. And that’s not even talking about all the cancer research and all the other research that popped up because it mentioned diversity and gender and things like that.
item.dc:creator: capnadorable

item.title: Caller: "I'm calling to report a bear on top of a power utility pole."
item.dc:creator: Devi8tor

item.title: Gone off the deep hand.
item.description: Catfish noodling (also called grabbling, hogging, or catfisting) is a method of catching catfish using only your bare hands. Noodlers wade into rivers or lakes, find underwater cavities where catfish nest, use their hand as bait to provoke a defensive bite, and wrestle the fish out of the water.
item.dc:creator: tractorist

item.title: GovBrief Today #537
item.description: Donald Trump gave Saudi Arabia a path to enriched uranium while bombing Iran for already having one. American companies have long been legally barred from helping Saudi Arabia go nuclear. AP sources say Trump just approved a 30-year deal that allows US firms to help the Saudis enrich uranium on their own soil without the toughest international inspections. He approved it on the 11th straight night of American bombs falling on Iran, five months into a war he says exists to stop them from enriching uranium. The United States and Israel launched a regional war over one country's centrifuges. Now Trump is selling them to another. We owe the world an explanation for the difference. I've emailed 8,326 stories over 537 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260721-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/bridge-ceremony [2] https://go.govbrief.today/saudi-nuclear [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july21 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/ca-mn-medicaid [5] https://go.govbrief.today/cyclospora-rfk [6] https://go.govbrief.today/measles-war [7] https://go.govbrief.today/nj-elections [8] https://go.govbrief.today/war-cost [9] https://go.govbrief.today/clayton-advances [10] https://go.govbrief.today/biden-appeal [11] https://go.govbrief.today/navarro-appeal [12] https://go.govbrief.today/rogoff-sues [13] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-bbc-discovery [14] https://go.govbrief.today/cornyn-pepfar [15] https://go.govbrief.today/house-funding [16] https://go.govbrief.today/mspb-independent [17] https://go.govbrief.today/mi-literacy [18] https://go.govbrief.today/witness-deportation Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
This reminds me of when I first grew a beard, my little sister asked if I use regular soap or just go a little lower when I wash my hair
Since I don't wash my hair every day I just use regular soap, but when I am washing my hair I just use shampoo for my whole head. Sometimes it makes my beard itchy so I just use beard oil and wipe the excess off in my hair.
Looked like a ice cube in the sink
It's 2005. I learned recently how many versions there are so I guess it's inevitable that they're going to make another one soon. All I have to say is there better be some goddamn Muppets!

item.title: They're labeling American veterans as domestic communist terrorists
item.description: FP edit. The video is getting censored... Frankly im stressed, depressed, and cant do much more as bout it. Starting to feel a little hopeless because of how little support for this there is. Everybody wants to bitch about how things are, but nobody wants to do anything. Nobody's listened for years. And I'm getting very worn down. Edit 2: Just found out I lost my last sponsorship today. I wasn't getting paid or any compensation, but it did help. I don't know if I'm gonna keep doing this. People can't even be bothered to vote. Why am I gonna put myself at risk for this nation or my communities again when all they do is threaten or chide me? I'm exhausted. I am close to having a full blown anxiety attack, and I need people to pay attention, please. People like me and other organizations that stand up for our constitutional rights are under threat by these documents. They lay out the start process for detentions and so much more. This needs to be paid attention to. This is a five alarm fire warning. Thank you. Please, take warnings from experts like myself and pay attention. The midterms are right around the corner. This doesn't just affect Americans. This will affect the world. For the rest of people who are reading this who are not American, we need your support now than ever. https://youtube.com/shorts/pmc4SjH9pa8 read more here https://www.yahoo.com/news/politics/articles/us-accuses-cuba-sweeping-spy-141459056.html
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.dc:creator: McKittyNuts

item.title: Congratulations. Your grocery cart now has a fucking credit score.
item.description: Remember when the price of milk depended on, I don't know... the fucking milk? Now we're flirting with the idea that your groceries should cost more because an algorithm thinks you'll sigh and pay it anyway. What a dystopian pile of bollocks. It's called "surveillance pricing," which sounds like a rejected Black Mirror episode, except the villain isn't AI—it's the quarterly earnings report. Nothing says "customer loyalty" like weaponizing the data you collected from the customer. We've somehow reached the stage where two people could walk into the same shop, pick up the same loaf of bread, and the computer asks: "Which one looks easier to financially mug?" That's not innovation. That's digital fucking pickpocketing. Technology was supposed to eliminate checkout lines, not reinvent price tags as personalized ransom notes. If your business model depends on charging me the maximum you think I'll tolerate, don't call it AI—call it greed with better software. #SurveillancePricing #Groceries #AI #ConsumerRights #Privacy #CorporateGreed #PoliticalSatire https://www.ctvnews.ca/toronto/article/toronto-is-looking-to-ban-surveillance-pricing-in-grocery-stores-but-what-is-this-pricing-practice/
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge
